title: elisena ringens
intro: Elisena ringens, also known as the "Ringent Nettle", is a perennial plant that belongs to the nettle family, Urticaceae. The medicinal properties of Elisena ringens lie in its leaves, stems, and roots, which contain various bioactive compounds such as flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins. The plant is known for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which can help to alleviate various health issues, including skin conditions, digestive problems, and respiratory issues. Elisena ringens can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions and promote overall well-being.
